omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Ads (e.g. banners, interstitials, and native ads) help us make money and continue to provide most of Tandem's features for free. When we tell advertisers your age, gender, location and device information, the ads you see on Tandem are more relevant and we earn more from them. We only pass on your personal data with your express consent. If you do not want your data to be passed on, you can revoke your consent at any time. Below you will find information and terms of use. Some of the services listed below may use cookies or mobile advertising identifiers to identify users, or they may use the technique of behavioral retargeting, i.e. displaying ads tailored to the user's interests and behavior, including those outside of Tandem recognized. Further information can be found in the privacy policies of the respective services. In addition to any opt-out offered by any of the services below, the user may opt out of a third-party service's use of cookies by visiting the Network Advertising Initiative opt-out page. Another option for disabling ad personalization is the preference management of YourOnlineChoices https://youronlinechoices.com.
